name: 15 GM Tretinoin And Clindamycin Gel
about: This 15 GM Tretinoin and Clindamycin Gel is a potent ointment known for its high purity level of 99%. It is a cream formulation primarily used in hospitals for various treatments. The dosage guidelines should be followed as per suggestions for effective results. Make sure to store this gel in a dry place to maintain its efficacy and quality over time.
